title: Citation (engage-prism)
description: Required shape of every citation entry produced by an engage-prism subagent report. Every non-derived claim in a report must point at one of these.

title.description: Human-readable title of the source (article headline, report name, company page title).

url.description: Absolute URL of the source. Must be http(s).

fetchedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the source was retrieved via WebFetch/WebSearch. Must include timezone (Z or offset).

excerpt.description: Short quoted or paraphrased extract from the source that supports the claim. Paraphrases must stay true to the source; do not fabricate text.

publishedAt.description: Optional. Publication date reported by the source (not the fetch time).

sourceClass.description: Optional. Category of source, used for authority weighting during synthesis.

urlUnreachable.description: Optional. Set true when the URL was valid at citation time but is no longer reachable. Do not invent an alternative.
